name: sbox-codex
description: Build s&box games by talking to Codex. Bundles the Codex Bridge MCP server (201 tools / 192 editor handlers, incl. a playtest harness that runs a scripted gameplay loop in play mode and asserts the result in-frame, networking/scene inspection & lint, save & services queries, scaffolds for a currency wallet / round-phase machine / day-night clock / interactable / weighted loot table / versioned save system / leaderboard panel / slot inventory / stat modifier system / placement mode, sandbox+razor lints, an asset dependency-chain copier, and call-method/input-action/drive-player/time-scale/profiler/debug-draw tools), a screenshot-driven game-dev workflow skill (sbox-build-feature), a schema-grounded s&box API skill (sbox-api: Unity->s&box translation + components/UI/networking/physics references, adapted from codex-sbox), the sbox-cookbook recipe router (code-grounded recipes from 51 open-source s&box games -- 11 engine + 18 system + 20 genre references + a cross-game CORPUS-INDEX), a sbox-scaffold-game starter, and an optional sbox-game-dev specialist agent. The s&box editor addon must be installed separately (see README).

interface.shortDescription: Drive the s&box editor from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Build s&box games from Codex with a pinned MCP server, workflow skills, API references, cookbook recipes, starter scaffolds, and onboarding for the s&box editor bridge.
defaultPrompt: Set up my s&box project for Codex.
Build a playable s&box starter scene.
